description: Create a new Business View named 'Globex-Infrastructure' and add the local server (127.0.0.1) to it. Then, create a new user account with Username 'globex_noc', Password 'Globex@Secure123', and Role 'Operator' (or 'Read Only'). Finally, restrict the user's access scope exclusively to the 'Globex-Infrastructure' Business View to ensure multi-tenant data segregation. Credentials: admin / Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
